driver_subject: scsi: bnx2i: Use scsi_cmd_to_rq() instead of scsi_cmnd.request
kernel_subject: scsi: core: Introduce the scsi_cmd_to_rq() function
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of scsi_cmnd.request with scsi_cmd_to_rq() function, explicitly stated as preparation for request pointer removal in kernel API
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly replaces scsi_cmnd.request with scsi_cmd_to_rq(), which matches kernel commit 51f3a4788928 introducing the scsi_cmd_to_rq() function. The kernel commit is in the same subsystem (scsi: core) and provides the exact API the driver migration adopts.
